title: Belong
lyrics: Those dark days seem to be trying to find a light but it's for the moment Don't need to rehearse and assess lost thoughts Don't need another verse to explain we should care It won't be easy making it past this line Explain to you all my mistrust, arguing less than dozen I should know that pain comes before the dawn That I'm not here to disperse hate Relate, conquer the past equations without divination Cause it all doesn't last long, no Find that place you belong to I belong with me, belong to my views and my structure of color If I let you in past the braces, past the war, past what love is for Can you not blame, find your sin, show you belong to you Your truth self signed, when you find that place you belong Hold on, no It doesn't last long at all, no If the light reaches you tonight I'm thankful that all I've gone through Can be told again, used as a tool Encapsulate the silver lining, be like cat, it's a dance to live in Life without strife, without judgment, yeah Somewhere you'll be happy, with you Happy in a place to belong to I want to belong to I want to belong with you I belong with me, belong to my views and my structure of color If I let you in past the braces, past the war, past what love is for Can you not blame, find your sin, show you belong to you Your truth self signed, when you find that place you belong Hold on, no It doesn't last long at all, no So now the world has acknowledged your misery No ancient foreign chemistry Just your heart beating next to me and a life with you Equations of understanding, a place to build happy for those Who don't have one A place to sing a song, yeah Baby, a place Where we can Belong Thanks for watching!

lyricsSegments.text: Those dark days seem to be trying to find a light but it's for the moment
Don't need to rehearse and assess lost thoughts
Don't need another verse to explain we should care
It won't be easy making it past this line
Explain to you all my mistrust, arguing less than dozen
I should know that pain comes before the dawn
That I'm not here to disperse hate
Relate, conquer the past equations without divination
Cause it all doesn't last long, no
Find that place you belong to
I belong with me, belong to my views and my structure of color
If I let you in past the braces, past the war, past what love is for
Can you not blame, find your sin, show you belong to you
Your truth self signed, when you find that place you belong
Hold on, no
It doesn't last long at all, no
If the light reaches you tonight
I'm thankful that all I've gone through
Can be told again, used as a tool
Encapsulate the silver lining, be like cat, it's a dance to live in
Life without strife, without judgment, yeah
Somewhere you'll be happy, with you
Happy in a place to belong to
I want to belong to
I want to belong with you
I belong with me, belong to my views and my structure of color
If I let you in past the braces, past the war, past what love is for
Can you not blame, find your sin, show you belong to you
Your truth self signed, when you find that place you belong
Hold on, no
It doesn't last long at all, no
So now the world has acknowledged your misery
No ancient foreign chemistry
Just your heart beating next to me and a life with you
Equations of understanding, a place to build happy for those
Who don't have one
A place to sing a song, yeah
Baby, a place
Where we can
Belong
Thanks for watching!
